ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station (in meters) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., date, amount) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule (e.g., warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension for the export format */,
  "default_template" TEXT /* Default template for the export format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
column_names: Date when the station was installed
Date of the last maintenance of the station
Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive)
Role of the user (e.g., data entry, data analyst, admin)
